items.content_html: View daily notes in a journal-like format, similar to Logseq. It enhances note organization and facilitates better reflection by consolidating daily notes into a continuous journaling view.

items.content_html: This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Allows you to create various global settings profiles. You can sync them between different vaults. To keep all your settings in sync, you'll never have to manually adjust them again for every vault you have or create in the future.
items.title: 4Source/settings-profiles-obsidian-plugin: This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Allows you to create various global settings profiles. You can sync them between different vaults. To keep all your settings in sync, you'll never have to manually adjust them again for every vault you have or create in the future.

items.content_html: Obsidian is a powerful, flexible note-taking app that uses markdown files to help organize and link your ideas. It excels in personal knowledge management, offering features like bidirectional linking, graph views, and plugins, making it ideal for creating a personal knowledge base.
items.title: natthasath/obsidian-plugin-theme: Obsidian is a powerful, flexible note-taking app that uses markdown files to help organize and link your ideas. It excels in personal knowledge management, offering features like bidirectional linking, graph views, and plugins, making it ideal for creating a personal knowledge base.
